Class HealthCheckProducer

java.lang.Object
org.demoiselle.jee.observability.health.HealthCheckProducer
@ApplicationScoped public class HealthCheckProducer extends Object
CDI producer for MicroProfile Health checks.

Produces a liveness check that verifies the CDI container is active, a readiness check that verifies the configuration module has been loaded, and a readiness check that verifies JWT cryptographic keys are available when demoiselle-security-jwt is on the classpath.

This producer is registered conditionally by ObservabilityExtension only when MicroProfile Health is available on the classpath.

    Produces a readiness health check named "demoiselle-configuration".

  • Constructor Details

    • HealthCheckProducer

      public HealthCheckProducer()

  • Method Details

    • cdiLivenessCheck

      @Produces @Liveness public org.eclipse.microprofile.health.HealthCheck cdiLivenessCheck()
      Produces a liveness health check named "demoiselle-cdi". If this code executes, the CDI container is active — so the check always returns UP.
      Returns:
      a HealthCheck that reports CDI container liveness

    • configurationReadinessCheck

      @Produces @Readiness public org.eclipse.microprofile.health.HealthCheck configurationReadinessCheck()
      Produces a readiness health check named "demoiselle-configuration". Verifies that the Demoiselle configuration module has been loaded by checking whether its CDI bean is resolvable in the container.
      Returns:
      a HealthCheck that reports configuration readiness

    • jwtKeysReadinessCheck

      @Produces @Readiness public org.eclipse.microprofile.health.HealthCheck jwtKeysReadinessCheck()
      Produces a readiness health check named "demoiselle-security-jwt-keys". When demoiselle-security-jwt is on the classpath, verifies that the JWT cryptographic keys (public key at minimum) are available. When the module is not on the classpath, reports UP with a note.
      Returns:
      a HealthCheck that reports JWT key readiness
